user_system_path: #481 forensics merged (PR #482). This commit lands the third forensic tool (decrypt failure classifier) and resets the control plane to between-rungs. #481 crack: swoop landed (don't give up); the grounding blocker splits into two measured layers — KEY GAP (24% of signals are valid AES-GCM my local key can't auth → verify prod ENCRYPTION_KEY_LEGACY) and FORMAT GAP (11%, incl. 357 uploaded_document rows stored as PLAINTEXT, dropped by usedFallback->continue — a prod-real, code-fixable bug). Plus hydration is interview-class-only. Remaining work is owner-gated.
allowed_files_raw: Forensic tool scripts/swoop-481-decrypt-classify.ts (classifies decrypt failures: valid_gcm_authfail vs not_base64) + control-plane reset to between-rungs. No product code, no schema, no deps.
forbidden_files_raw: No source (lib/**, app/**), no schema, no deps.
acceptance_condition: Classifier committed; control plane between-rungs; gate:continuity green; no PII in repo.
anti_regression_checks: gate:continuity green in between-rungs form (active_issue none)
stop_condition: Between-rungs. Owner names the next seam. Owner-gated #481 follow-ups: (a) verify prod ENCRYPTION_KEY_LEGACY (24% key gap); (b) CODE fix the format gap — stop dropping legitimate plaintext rows from grounding (highest-leverage, harness-testable); (c) generalize full-body hydration; (d) one paid gen cycle AFTER (a)/(b) so validation runs on an un-starved corpus.
next_command: Owner: pick the next seam. Recommended order: (b) format-gap code fix → (a) prod key verification → (c) hydration generalization → (d) paid validation run.
